title: Costs
doc_html:
§4949.  Costs

Where no opposition is made to the confirmation of the sale, the cost of attending the proceeding shall be paid by the party who prays for the monition.  Where opposition is made, the costs shall be borne by the party against whom judgment is rendered.
doc_text:
§4949.  Costs
Where no opposition is made to the confirmation of the sale, the cost of attending the proceeding shall be paid by the party who prays for the monition.  Where opposition is made, the costs shall be borne by the party against whom judgment is rendered.
